root.sql: SELECT sn.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sn.membership_no) as member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sn.membership_no) as member_group_name, sn.operate_date, sn.doc_edit, ( SELECT prename FROM sc_mem_m_ucf_prename WHERE prename_code = sn.pre_prename_code ) || sn.pre_member_name || ' ' ||sn.pre_member_surname AS c_name_pre, ( SELECT prename FROM sc_mem_m_ucf_prename WHERE prename_code = sn.prename_code ) || sn.member_name || ' ' || sn.member_surname AS c_name_edit, sn.entry_id,sn.entry_date FROM sc_mem_edit_name sn WHERE 1 = 1 and sn.operate_date between '!entry_date_1!' and '!entry_date_2!' ORDER BY sn.membership_no
